case_title: PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS VS. TAMRA JACKSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS SERVED DEC-28-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, TAMRA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, TAMRA $1,067.23 PRINCIPAL, $266.81 ATTORNEY FEES, $186.69 INTEREST, $151.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,672.53, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
